solution: 
```cpp
class Solution {
public:
    int findNthDigit(int n) {
        int length = 1;
        long count = 9;
        long start = 1;

        while (n > length * count) {
            n -= length * count;
            count *= 10;
            start *= 10;
            length++;
        }

        int number = start + (n - 1) / length;
        int digitIndex = (n - 1) % length;
        return (number / (int)(pow(10, length - digitIndex - 1))) % 10;
    }
};
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: <The algorithm determines the range of digits the nth digit belongs to, calculates the exact number containing the digit, and then extracts the specific digit. It avoids iterating through all numbers up to n, making it efficient.>
